title: Ultimate Seedance Guide 2026: How to Use Seedance 2.0 For AI Video Generation
summary: A tutorial on Seedance 2.0 for AI video generation showing how to use the tool for production workflows. The video covers prompt engineering, reference stacking, multi-shot consistency, and comparisons with competitor models Veo 3 and Kling 3. The presenter tests the tool on various tasks including chase scenes, fight scenes, lip-sync, and product ads.
